positive: Minimalist celestial nebula silhouette design. A vibrant, cosmic cluster featuring deep indigo and amethyst gradients transitioning into streaks of electric magenta and warm gold. The main subject is a stylized, geometric arrangement of crescent moons, constellations, and abstract swirling gas clouds, organized in a radial, mandala-like pattern. The style should be clean line art merged with watercolor galaxy gradients, ensuring high contrast against a solid, neutral background. Perfect for printing on apparel, optimized for a central, symmetrical composition with clean, visible outlines and no excessive photographic realism. Style: Modern abstract, celestial, ethereal.
